programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: Diana Prince lives quietly among mortals in the vibrant, sleek 1980s -- an era of excess driven by the pursuit of having it all. Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Miller re-examines a case that has haunted her for years as she searches for the link between two murders that happened at the exact same time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team reopens the 1981 case of a yuppie couple's murder; while investigating, Lily discovers that the couple's friends had ties to a '70s radical activist group.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: In order to solve a murder, the team enters the world of unwed mothers during the 1950s and '60s and the maternity homes where they were hidden.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a spell backfires, Prue takes on all of the pain in the world and is flattened by the overwhelming flood of human emotion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Cole uses petty anger between Prue, Phoebe and Piper to break their sisterly bond and smash the bedrock of their powers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Cole's true identity is revealed, Phoebe must decide between following her heart or defying her sisters.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a she-demon takes possession of Piper before her 10-year high-school reunion, it is up to Prue and Phoebe to save their unsightly sister.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Charmed
programme.sub-title: We All Scream for Ice Cream
programme.desc: An evil ice-cream man lures Prue and Phoebe into another dimension, where they are tricked into harming an innocent person.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a theater owner discovers a.38 slug in a piece of set furniture that is not being used as a prop, Lilly and Jeffries reinvestigate a case involving the shooting of a local cabaret singer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A woman researching her family history learns that her great-grandmother was murdered in 1929 and the case was never solved, prompting Lilly to take a look.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Days before his scheduled execution, a man Jeffries arrested in 1994 begs him to re-examine the case.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A 1945 case involves an ambitious reporter demoted to writing trivial advice columns.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A 1984 shooting case reopens when a new witness comes forward; Lilly follows a lead into the gambling world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
programme.desc: Seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife, an elite Navy SEAL uncovers a covert plot that threatens to engulf the United States and Russia in an all-out war.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff (Ben Affleck) is a mathematics savant with more affinity for numbers than people. Using a small-town CPA office as a cover, he makes his living as a freelance accountant for dangerous criminal organizations. With a Treasury agent (J.K. Simmons) hot on his heels, Christian takes on a state-of-the-art robotics company as a legitimate client. As Wolff gets closer to the truth about a discrepancy that involves millions of dollars, the body count starts to rise.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: Pilot Brodie Torrance saves passengers from a lightning strike by making a risky landing on a war-torn island -- only to find that surviving the landing was just the beginning. When dangerous rebels take most of the passengers hostage, the only person Torrance can count on for help is Louis Gaspare, an accused murderer who was being transported by the FBI.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: Christian Wolff (Ben Affleck) is a mathematics savant with more affinity for numbers than people. programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A homeless family living in a station wagon becomes the team's focus as it investigates the murder of a woman whose body was found at the bottom of a river.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The detectives must solve the 20-year-old case of a 6-year-old boy's rape and murder.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team takes on the high-stakes world of high-school cheerleading when an anonymous confession to a teen girl's murder turns up at an art exhibit.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The sisters battle a warlock who exterminates witches and takes their powers; an interfering "Whitelighter" causes friction between Piper and Leo.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Prue discovers that her ex-boyfriend is mutating into a demon, she and her sisters battle for his soul in an underworld wrestling ring.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper's wedding day is jeopardized when Prue is arrested on suspicion of murder after her astral self engages in late-night shenanigans.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lilly breaks procedural rules, putting herself and others in danger while investigating a drug counselor who was killed two days before he would testify against a student.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The case of two teens who killed themselves after a murderous rampage at a mall in 1995 reopens when evidence indicates there may have been a third shooter.

programme.desc: A 2004 case involving the disappearance of a female war veteran reopens when her prosthetic arm is found in a river.
